movie.title: Khakii (2020) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & Kannada] WEB-DL HEVC - 360p, 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDrive | BSub
movie.synopsis: Khakii is a romantic action drama film written and directed By Naviin Reddy B and produced by Manasa Tarun, Tarun Shivappa under Tarun Talkies banner. The movie cast includes Chirranjeevi Sarja and Tanya Hope are playing the main lead roles while Ritvik Muralidhar scored music.
